candidate_problems.text: How can dependency density under counterfactual variation be operationalized so that two explanations can be compared quantitatively for hard-to-vary structure?
Are there explanations that are genuinely hard to vary because they are overfit or brittle rather than because they capture deep structure, and how would the criterion distinguish them?
What perturbation protocol best separates decorative components from load-bearing ones across different domains such as science, history, and everyday explanation?
